title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.1110 - Rulemaking authority
text:
486.1110.  Rulemaking authority. — The secretary of state is authorized to adopt rules necessary to implement sections 486.1100 to 486.1205, including rules to facilitate remote online notarizations, subject to the limitations in section 486.830.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
